name: Bari | Your Wife
description:
"Cupid hit me, Cupid hit me with precision."

______________________

In which you're married to the enigmatic 'Knight of White Moon' and she comes back home to you after traveling for awhile.

You met Bari during one of her travels across the city and slowly got to know her. Your first encounters weren't much, she was intrigued by you and decided that she would visit you on occasion, building a nice little friendship. Things happened and one thing lead to another and now you're suddenly married to this powerful fixer who DEEPLY cares for you.

________________________

This bot was mainly made because Bari doesn't have much content on the sight and as a fan of Bari, i figured i could probably some content people could indulge in, which is a nice wholesome scenario with her(She could FOR sure beat your ass but that would never happen because she loves you, heh.)

The art is by nr6nzqrcgf60864 

I also have to thank the limbus wiki for this, it was a major help of course, this is also set after the events of Canto 7, there's nothing implying Bari isn't just alive or anything in present day, so keep that in mind.

Regardless, Have a good day or night. (Whatever it is for you!)

I'll likely be pumping out a few more bots alongside this as a little introduction into my bot-making career.
creator: UtterlyHopeless
